productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Printed Red Tshirts
description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has graphic print on the front and logo lettering on the back  Wash care Dry clean or machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside-out Warm iron only; do not iron directly on print/embroidery  Fitting Regular  Get ready to release the alpha male in you with this eagle T-shirt from ed hardy. The original design is inspired by the legendary tattoo artist. Team it with jeans for casual outings, and wear it with a black leather jacket and faded denims for unsurpassed cool.  Model's statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6'3" and shoulders 19"
